expectations.evidence: Root Cause section: 'Broken shebang line: The first line of the script is #/bin/bash instead of #!/bin/bash'

expectations.text: Identifies that the pipe character is interpreted by bash as a pipe operator
expectations.evidence: Analysis says 'While unquoted echo arguments work in this specific case (no glob characters or ambiguous whitespace), quoting is a defensive best practice'. This is INCORRECT — the | in 'echo Click here | href=...' IS a real bug, not just a style issue. Bash interprets it as a pipe operator.

expectations.text: Provides a corrected version of the plugin script
expectations.evidence: Corrected status.sh output file with quotes added

expectations.text: Explains why the issues cause the plugin to not display
expectations.evidence: Only explains shebang issue. Dismisses the pipe issue as cosmetic ('unquoted echo arguments work in this specific case') when it's actually a critical bug.
